message:
fix(release): apply missing #190 hunk and pin asupersync; bump to v0.3.4

Two follow-ups to unblock the v0.3.3 release:

1. **#190 fix was incomplete in v0.3.3.** The check_remote_path commit
   (2d373427) only staged the hunk introducing `remote_cmd` but missed
   the hunk that actually *removes* the old `"sh", "-c", &cmd,` argv
   elements and replaces them with `&remote_cmd`. The compile fails
   with `E0425: cannot find value 'cmd' in this scope` because `cmd`
   was renamed to `script`. This commit completes the intended change:
   single-argument `sh -c <quoted-script>` now actually flows through
   the ssh argv as originally designed.

2. **Pin asupersync in release.yml** to db186126 (last SHA known-good
   for this repo's builds). Upstream asupersync main is transiently
   carrying trait-breaking API churn that blocks every downstream
   release; pinning locally is the cheapest way to unblock CASS
   releases without waiting for the upstream fix. Unpin when upstream
   main compiles cleanly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -84,7 +84,9 @@ jobs:
         shell: bash
         run: |
           # Path dependencies reference sibling directories (../repo)
-          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git ../asupersync
+          # asupersync main transiently broken (trait-breaking API churn upstream); pin last SHA known-good for CASS builds.
+          git clone https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git ../asupersync
+          git -C ../asupersync checkout --quiet db186126b40d9d3028be731ff1bfea47614e2b1b
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite.git ../frankensqlite
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection.git ../franken_agent_detection
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch.git ../frankensearch
@@ -217,7 +219,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Clone sibling dependencies
         shell: bash
         run: |
-          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git ../asupersync
+          # asupersync main transiently broken (trait-breaking API churn upstream); pin last SHA known-good for CASS builds.
+          git clone https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git ../asupersync
+          git -C ../asupersync checkout --quiet db186126b40d9d3028be731ff1bfea47614e2b1b
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite.git ../frankensqlite
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection.git ../franken_agent_detection
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch.git ../frankensearch
@@ -384,7 +388,9 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Clone sibling dependencies
         run: |
-          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git ../asupersync
+          # asupersync main transiently broken (trait-breaking API churn upstream); pin last SHA known-good for CASS builds.
+          git clone https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git ../asupersync
+          git -C ../asupersync checkout --quiet db186126b40d9d3028be731ff1bfea47614e2b1b
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite.git ../frankensqlite
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection.git ../franken_agent_detection
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch.git ../frankensearch

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "coding-agent-search"
-version = "0.3.3"
+version = "0.3.4"
 edition = "2024"
 authors = ["Jeffrey Emanuel"]
 description = "Unified TUI search over local coding agent histories"
